title: Implement magic link signUp (signInWithOtp)
description: Wire the magic link 'Send link' button on /signup and the 'Resend' button on /verify-email to Supabase's signInWithOtp method.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking 'Send link' calls supabase.auth.signInWithOtp({ email, options: { emailRedirectTo: window.location.origin + '/auth/callback' } })
On error: show error inline below the magic link email field
Resend button on /verify-email re-calls signInWithOtp with the stored email
Resend button shows a 30-second cooldown after clicking (to prevent abuse)

steps.details: document.getElementById('send-magic-link').addEventListener('click', async () => { const email = document.getElementById('magic-email').value; const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOtp({ email, options: { emailRedirectTo: window.location.origin + '/auth/callback' } }); if (error) { showError(error.message); return; } window.location.href = '/verify-email?email=' + encodeURIComponent(email); });

document.getElementById('resend-btn').addEventListener('click', async () => { const email = sessionStorage.getItem('pending_email'); if (!email) return; await supabase.auth.signInWithOtp({ email, options: { emailRedirectTo: window.location.origin + '/auth/callback' } }); startResendCooldown(); });

function startResendCooldown() { let t = 30; resendBtn.disabled = true; const iv = setInterval(() => { resendBtn.textContent = 'Resend in ' + t + 's'; if (--t < 0) { clearInterval(iv); resendBtn.disabled = false; resendBtn.textContent = 'Resend email'; } }, 1000); }
